title: I want to update items column in bulk i.e for a board i want to update all items column having id as "text" how to achieve that?

posts.author: Sagar (Neupane)
posts.cookedHtml:
mutation_query = f"“”
mutation {{
change_multiple_column_values(
board_id: “{board_id}”,
column_values: ‘{{“{column_id}”:“{column_value}”, “ids”: {json.dumps(item_ids)}}}’
) {{
id
}}
}}
“”"

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Sagar,

There is no way to do that using one mutation.

You can either iterate through the items and send one request per item, or go with the approach explained here to send multiple mutations in one request.

Cheers,
Matias
